name: Request Agent Task
description: Send a request to an agent and get a response. PRIMARY tool for agent delegation. Creates a tracked Job with a result. Example: agent_request(agentId='Helper', input={task: 'summarise w/notes/daily', format: 'bullet list'}, wait=true). The input must carry the full request content — never send {} or the agent has nothing to act on.

input.description: The request payload. Must contain the actual instructions, data, or parameters the agent needs to do the work. An empty object {} means the agent has nothing to act on — always populate this field with the full task content.

wait.description: Wait for the agent to complete. true = block until done (recommended — you usually want the result). false = return PENDING immediately. Integer = timeout in ms.

output.description: Task status. When wait=true and the agent completes, includes the full output.
